task: T-03 Daily Ops Report v1 Readiness Decision

readiness_answers.Q06_detail: DEFAULT_CURRENT_DATE = '2026-05-06' still hardcoded in marketRegimeResult.ts. Must be replaced with dynamic date source before production.
readiness_answers.Q09_detail: Field renamed to noLegacyHypotheses to avoid embedding hypothesis codes in JSON keys.

P0_Immediate.title: LLM Hard-Off / Safe-Run + Missing-TaskId Alert
P0_Immediate.description: Implement LLM hard-off mode (no LLM calls in safe-run), missing-taskId alert when scheduled tasks do not report back. This is a scheduler safety layer. Can consume OpsReport status to decide whether to proceed or halt.

P1_Next.title: Unified Freshness Guard
P1_Next.description: Wire OpsReport freshness.requiresAction into the scheduler/pipeline as a blocking guard. When true, emit alert and optionally pause non-critical pipeline stages.

P1_Next.title: Replace DEFAULT_CURRENT_DATE hardcoded
P1_Next.description: DEFAULT_CURRENT_DATE = '2026-05-06' is hardcoded. Replace with dynamic date source (e.g., process.env.REPORT_DATE or new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]) for production.

P2_Deferred.title: Ops Report UI Dashboard
P2_Deferred.description: Build a simple dashboard UI that consumes /api/report/ops and displays system health status to operators.

P2_Deferred.title: Lane-based Scheduler Heartbeat
P2_Deferred.description: Extend scheduler with periodic heartbeat that checks OpsReport status and emits alerts when freshness thresholds are crossed.
